first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the core reasoning remains the same across both evaluations. Both versions cite the same three critical shortcomings: insufficient C++ experience, a lack of cloud platform background, and no formal technical leadership roles. The minor variations in phrasing and emphasis are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any substantive change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on their location.
